intent.rawPrompt:
I  need a visual test run indicator added to the ui so i know what tests are run and the status of them so we can monitor live code state. that means the test that the ai generates needs to added and updated realtime with releevant state and status codes.

Desired outcome: Implement a real-time visual test run indicator in the Intent Studio UI that displays active test execution status and state codes for AI-generated tests.

codeSurface.label: Intent Studio
codeSurface.rationale: The prompt targets Intent Studio run results, run status, or capture links inside intent-poc-app.

alternatives.label: Capture And Evidence
alternatives.reason: The issue may still involve capture outputs, but the broken behavior is in the Studio results UI.

alternatives.label: Surface Library
alternatives.reason: The request still references screenshots and could be mistaken for a library evidence task.

businessIntent.statement: Implement a real-time visual test run indicator in the Intent Studio UI that displays active test execution status and state codes for AI-generated tests to enable live monitoring of code state.
businessIntent.desiredOutcome: A persistent UI component in Intent Studio that dynamically updates to show the current execution status (e.g., pending, running, passed, failed) and associated state codes for active AI-generated test runs.

acceptanceCriteria.description: A new UI component is integrated into the Intent Studio layout to display test execution status.
The indicator updates in real-time as test execution progresses.
The indicator displays both the human-readable status and the machine-readable state code.
Visual verification confirms the indicator renders correctly in both light and dark themes.

scenarios.title: Display test execution status in Intent Studio
scenarios.goal: Verify that the test run indicator appears and reflects the initial state of an AI-generated test.
given: The user is in the Intent Studio interface
then: The test run indicator component is visible
The indicator displays a 'Running' status and the corresponding state code

scenarios.title: Update test status in real-time
scenarios.goal: Verify that the indicator updates dynamically as the test state changes.
given: The test run indicator is visible and showing 'Running' status
then: The indicator displays the updated state code

workItems.title: Implement real-time test execution status indicator
workItems.description: Integrate a persistent UI component in Intent Studio that displays the current execution status and state codes for AI-generated test runs.
workItems.userVisibleOutcome: A visible status indicator in the Intent Studio UI that updates from 'Running' to 'Passed' based on test execution state.
workItems.verification: Playwright specs will mock the Studio state to verify the indicator renders correctly in both 'running' and 'passed' states, ensuring the UI reflects the underlying machine state.

checkpoints.label: Verify running state indicator
checkpoints.assertion: The indicator displays 'Running' status and code when the test is active.
